description: Leading cloud platform engineering focused on secure, self-healing GKE clusters, migrating core banking applications, and integrating MLOps models.
responsibilities: Own the GKE platform architecture and golden-path standards used across application teams.
Lead GitOps delivery via ArgoCD across multi-region clusters.
Drive cloud cost governance and FinOps reporting for platform workloads.
Partner with data science teams to productionize ML pipelines on Vertex AI and Kubeflow.
achievements: Architected multi-region GKE Enterprise clusters hosting 120+ microservices, improving deployment frequency by 320% through GitOps patterns with ArgoCD.
Implemented full-stack cloud cost controls using Kubecost and automated GKE auto-scaling, reducing monthly GCP expenditure by 34% ($140K+ annualized).
Configured network security boundaries using GCP Cloud Armor and Istio Service Mesh.
Built an end-to-end MLOps pipeline on Kubeflow and Vertex AI, accelerating model deployments from 3 weeks to under 40 minutes.

description: Owned high-availability cloud migration efforts, CI/CD pipeline structures, and secrets management systems for global telecom clients.
responsibilities: Led migration of legacy VM-based telecom platforms to AWS EKS.
Designed reusable Terraform modules used across 40+ product squads.
Rolled out enterprise HashiCorp Vault integration for secrets management.
achievements: Migrated legacy VM-based telecommunication platforms to AWS EKS container frameworks, resolving long-standing configuration drift.
Engineered standardized reusable Terraform modules to enforce organization-wide networking, IAM, and database patterns across 40 distinct product squads.
Introduced an enterprise HashiCorp Vault cluster integrated with EKS pods via mutating webhook, eliminating hardcoded credentials.

description: Linux system administration, database replication schemes, and shell automation for client bank platforms.
responsibilities: Automated backup verification and monitoring for transactional databases.
Monitored live application status using Prometheus, Grafana, and ELK.
achievements: Managed 150+ RedHat Linux enterprise servers, automating monthly security patching and vulnerability remediation using Ansible playbooks.
Wrote Bash and Python utility scripts to automate transactional database backup verifications, cutting manual validation time by 4 hours daily.
Monitored live application status using Prometheus, Grafana, and ELK stack, resolving alerts, storage overflows, and CPU bottlenecks.
